title: euphrasia onegensis
intro: Euphrasia onegensis, also known as Orogenia onegensis, is a rare alpine plant species that belongs to the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Euphrasia onegensis include its potential to treat eye and skin conditions, such as conjunctivitis and eczema, and to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia onegensis include infusions and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
